titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 40: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 40. (A.R. No. B 219 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARUDŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, west and south walls of the central shrine, Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple.

This record is much damaged. It seems to register the purchase of two vēli of land from the assembly of Pērāvūr by auction, by the officer of the king, Kōyil-Mayilai alias Madhurāntaka Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Śiṟṟiṅgaṇ for granting to the temple of Śrī-Mūlasthānattu-Perumāṉaḍigaḷ at Tiruviḍaimarudil. The land was also made tax-free in consideration of 150 kāśu. The transaction is stated to have been effected with the concurrence (?) of the sabhā of Tiraimūr as the dēvakarmīs of the temple, the nagarattār of Tiruviḍaimarudil, Iṅgaṇāṭṭu-Pallavaraiyar, the śrīkāriyam of the temple on behalf of the above adhikāri, and the accountant of the temple, Tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ Śivaṉ, on behalf of the queen, Chōḷa-Mādēviyār, all being assembled together in the temple at Tiruviḍaimarudil. This officer Kōyil-Mayilai alias Madhurāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷān figures in the Kōnērirājapuram inscription of the same ruler. No. 52 (S.I.I., Vol. III, p. 302).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 162.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 6Āvatu tiruviṭai marutuṭaiyār tevakanmikaḷāṉa tiraimur sabhaiyārum tiruvi
ṭaimarutil nakarattārum Atikārikaḷ maturāntakamuventa veḷārkkāyt tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār śrīkāryamārāykiṉṟa Iṅkaṇ
ṇāṭṭup pallavaraiyarum nampirāṭṭiyār coḻamahādeviyārkkāy tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyārkkuk kaṇkāṇik kaṇakku Eḻu
tukiṉṟa tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ civaṉ Ivvaṉaivomum Uṭaiyār koyililey ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyāṉ koyiṉmayilaiyā
ṉa maturāntaka muventaveḷāṉ perāvūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉam perāvūr sabhai Iṭaiy
Iṟaiyiliy koṇṭanilam tiruviṭaimarutil śrīmulastāṉattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku
Inta tanta nilattukku tanta Iṟaiyiliyōlaiy kalveṭṭiṉapaṭiy ko
pparakecaripanmaṟkki yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu Āṟāmāṇṭāṉit tiṅkaḷ matinā
ṭpakkam pañcamiy nāḷ kaḷ Itu vāṇṭitu tiṅkaḷ Itu nāḷ Itu pakkam Itu paruvamāka Iru māṭu
ñ cāṟṟiya mummāṭu keḻvittu perāvūr sabhaiyom muṉpakal naṉpakal Āvaṇattuk keṭṭu Īḻa
kkācu Iṟaiyili paṇam Ivvūr sabhaiyār perāvūr nilattil kkit tarutum koṇṭuvilai taruvir Illaiyoveṉṟu muṟkkū
ṟa Ammoḻi keṭṭu nilamuṭaiya I ṟi maturāntakamuventaveḷāṉ ni(y)ṅkaḷ Iṉakku viṟṟut tanta nilam 2 Iru veli Iṉṉila
m Iruveliyum candatirāttavaṟ Iṟai mutal kātta kkuk koṇṭu kuṭup
pom Oru kālāvatu mirukālāvatu Iṟaiyili Iṟaiyiliyākkit takutu
ḻi keṭṭum pāṭakam ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyār Ik koyililey Ivar
koṇṭu kuṭuppo muṟkūṟap perāvūr sabhai
yom Eṅkaḷūr nilam Iru veliyum candrātittaval nilam Iru kālāvatu mukkālāvatum llaiyoveṉṟu muṟkūṟa
p piṟkūṟiya Iṅkaṇāṭṭuc ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyāṉ koyil mayilaiyāṉa matu vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam Iruveliyum śandrātit taval Iṟaiyi
liyākkit taril vilai koṇṭuṭaiya māṉattup perā kuṭup� Oru kālāvatu Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatu koḷveṉeṉṟu piṟkū
ṟ muṟkūṟiya perāvūr sabhaiyom śantrātittaval Iṟaiyiliyāka nilattukkellai ki
ḻpārkkellai tevaṉ kālil kiḻakku nokkip poṉavāykkālukkukkut teṟkum Iṉṉum
lai ṉ Araṅka tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai
kkum melpārkkellai cuṭukāṭukkukki ṉ pārkellai cuṭukāṭṭiṉ vaṭavaruke Ivvūrk kuḷattiṉiṉṟum
vaṭakkum Iṉṉam Iṉṉilattukkel ṉu miṉṉilattukkey teṉpārkkellai Ivvūr kuḷattukke va
l pārkkellai tiruvaṭikaḷ kuḷattukku kiḻakku kkaḷ nilattukkum
vicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam Iruveliyum Iṉṉilam Iruveli
lkaḷum kiṇaṟukaḷum Uṭpaṭa Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa ni
tik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye Iṉṉilam
kaik koṇṭa Īḻakkācu
koṇṭom koṇṭa kācu
10økācu nūṟṟaimpatuṅ ko
śandrātittavaṟ Iṟai Ili
y kalveṭṭi viṟṟukkuṭutte
t tiruviṭai marutuṭaiya māte Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
